task: Update docs after adding a user-facing feature and a new environment variable.
withoutPdg: Updated the feature page and marked done.
withPdg: PDG triggered: yes. Coverage pass: compared src/feature.ts, README.md, and .env.example; new env var DOC_MODE added to install docs. Grounding pass: every setup claim cites README.md or .env.example. Regression pass: ran `npm test` and previewed `/docs/setup`; residual risk: none.

task: Generate architecture docs for a simple API with no queue evidence.
withoutPdg: Architecture page documents API, worker queue, Redis, and Postgres.
withPdg: PDG triggered: yes. Coverage pass: manifest includes api.ts and package.json only. Grounding pass: Redis and worker queue removed because no named source evidence supports them. Regression pass: checked generated link `/docs/architecture`; residual risk: no runtime browser check.

task: Update docs after removing an export feature that still appears in suggested questions.
withoutPdg: Updated the page title and kept the suggested questions.
withPdg: PDG triggered: yes. Coverage pass: removed export behavior found in diff and question bank. Grounding pass: deleted stale suggested question because no source evidence remains. Regression pass: ran `node scripts/check-links.js` and verified `/docs/app`; residual risk: human should approve wording.

task: Document a draft API quickly without running a preview.
withPdg: PDG triggered: yes. Coverage pass: api/openapi.yaml and docs/api.md compared. Grounding pass: unsupported auth claim marked Unknown. Regression pass skipped: preview server unavailable; residual risk: links and rendered layout unverified.

task: Evaluate a PRD companion that lists source paths before scoring its source coverage.
withoutPdg: Rated source coverage 14/15 because the document lists many file paths.
withPdg: PDG triggered: yes. Artifacts inspected: scripts, skills, agents, hooks, and configs. Overlap findings: existing checks partially cover the proposal, so reuse/extend before adding new machinery. Source-grounded matrix: claim/source/verdict/impact. Coverage pass: opened the cited hooks and checks before rating. Grounding pass: a listed path is evidence only after direct inspection; unsupported claims marked Unknown and the score lowered. Regression pass: ran `rg CODEBASE_MAP` and `npm test`; residual risk: live reviewer discipline still needs human validation.
